assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM would not know about .SkipResponseHandling()

assertions.assertion: Explains that by default BFF converts 401/403 to JSON-friendly responses instead of redirects
assertions.rationale: Without skill, this BFF-specific behavior would not be known

assertions.assertion: Endpoint still uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: Without skill, the combination of these extensions is not known

assertions.assertion: Endpoint uses .RequireAuthorization() to trigger the challenge
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the skip pattern, the full solution cannot be assembled
